0.question: What can I rent?
0.answer: You can rent a wide variety of items including electronics, tools, equipment, vehicles, real estate, and much more. Our platform connects renters with item owners for safe and convenient transactions.

1.question: How do I create a listing?
1.answer: To create a listing, log into your account, click on 'Create Listing', fill in all required information about your item including description, price, and availability, then click 'Publish' to make it live.

2.question: How do I edit my listing?
2.answer: Navigate to your listings, select the one you want to modify, click 'Edit', make your changes, and save. Your listing will be updated immediately.

3.question: How do I remove a listing?
3.answer: Open the listing you want to remove, click 'Edit', then select 'Remove from Publication'. The listing will no longer be visible to other users.

4.question: Is my payment information secure?
4.answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption and secure payment gateways to protect your financial information. We never store your complete payment details on our servers.

5.question: How does the rental process work?
5.answer: Browse available items, select your rental period, submit a booking request, complete payment, arrange pickup or delivery with the owner, and return the item at the end of your rental period.

6.question: What if an item is damaged during rental?
6.answer: Report any damage immediately through our platform. Depending on the rental agreement and any insurance purchased, you may be responsible for repair or replacement costs.

7.question: Can I cancel a rental?
7.answer: Cancellation policies vary by listing. Check the specific listing's cancellation policy before booking. Some rentals offer full refunds if cancelled within a certain timeframe.

8.question: How do I contact support?
8.answer: You can reach our support team through the 'Contact Us' page or by emailing support@lorentbloom.com. We typically respond within 24 hours.

9.question: What fees does the platform charge?
9.answer: We charge a small service fee on each transaction to maintain the platform and provide secure payment processing. The exact fee is displayed before you confirm any booking.

10.question: How do I leave a review?
10.answer: After completing a rental, you'll receive a prompt to leave a review. You can also navigate to your rental history and leave reviews for past transactions.

11.question: How do I list my item for rent?
11.answer: It's simple and free! Create an account, go to 'Create Listing', upload quality photos of your item, write a description, set your daily rental price and availability dates, and publish. Your item will be visible to all users on the platform right away.

12.question: How is my item protected when I rent it out?
12.answer: Both parties sign a digital contract before any rental begins, which clearly outlines responsibilities and conditions. All users are verified, and the platform keeps a full chat history as evidence. You can report any damage through the platform, and our support team will assist with resolution.

13.question: How do I get paid as a listing owner?
13.answer: Payment is currently only possible directly between the parties of the transaction.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.paragraph1: Lorent Bloom was founded with a simple idea: why buy things you only need temporarily, and why let your own belongings sit idle? We created a platform where anyone can rent what they need — or list what they own and earn extra income.
ourStory.paragraph2: From our beginnings in Moldova to becoming a trusted marketplace, we've remained committed to building a community where sharing makes sense. We connect people who have items with those who need them.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to make renting and earning easy and accessible for everyone. We believe that sharing resources is smarter, more economical, and better for the environment. Whether you want to rent something for a project or earn money by listing your items — our platform makes it simple, secure, and fair for both sides.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We ensure every listing meets our standards with accurate descriptions, real photos, and verified information so you know exactly what you're renting.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Building trust between owners and renters is at the heart of what we do. We verify users, protect payments, and provide support for every transaction.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve our platform to make finding and renting items as simple as possible, with smart search, secure messaging, and easy booking.

support.title: Customer Support
support.description: Our dedicated team is here to help with any questions about listings, rentals, or payments. We're with you every step of the way.

how-to-rent-out.title: How to Rent Out Your Items
how-to-rent-out.subtitle: Turn your unused belongings into extra income
how-to-rent-out.introduction: Have items sitting around that you rarely use? Our platform makes it easy to rent out your personal belongings to people in your community. From power tools to camping gear, cameras to party supplies – if someone needs it temporarily, you can earn from it. Follow these simple steps to start renting out your items today.

steps.title: 5 Simple Steps to Rent Out Your Items

step1.title: 1. Prepare Your Item
step1.description: Make sure your item is clean, functional, and ready to rent. A well-maintained item builds trust and attracts more renters.

items.item1: Clean the item thoroughly and check that everything works properly
items.item2: Gather all accessories, cables, manuals, or parts that go with it
items.item3: Note any wear, scratches, or imperfections to mention in your listing

step2.title: 2. Take Quality Photos
step2.description: Great photos help your listing stand out. Show potential renters exactly what they're getting.

items.item1: Use good lighting and a clean background
items.item2: Capture multiple angles and close-ups of important details
items.item3: Include photos of accessories and show the item in use if possible

step3.title: 3. Create Your Listing
step3.description: Write a clear, honest description that answers questions renters might have.

items.item1: Describe what the item is, its condition, and key features
items.item2: Set your rental price (daily, weekly, or custom periods)
items.item3: Specify pickup location, availability, and any usage requirements

step4.title: 4. Communicate with Renters
step4.description: Good communication builds trust and leads to successful rentals.

items.item1: Respond to inquiries promptly and answer questions thoroughly
items.item2: Discuss rental dates, pickup/return details, and expectations
items.item3: Be clear about deposit requirements and your cancellation policy

step5.title: 5. Complete the Rental
step5.description: Make the handover smooth and professional to ensure a great experience for both parties.

items.item1: Meet in a safe location and verify the renter's identity
items.item2: Walk through how to use the item and document its condition together
items.item3: Collect payment and deposit, then confirm the return date

tips.title: Tips for Successful Renting
tips.tip1: Research similar items on the platform to set competitive prices
tips.tip2: Respond to messages quickly – fast replies lead to more bookings
tips.tip3: Keep your items well-maintained between rentals
tips.tip4: Be flexible with pickup times and locations when possible
tips.tip5: Build your reputation by providing excellent service and earning positive reviews

metadata.title: Terms and Conditions for the Rental Marketplace
metadata.description: Read the terms and conditions of the Lorent Bloom platform and learn about your rights and responsibilities.

introduction.heading: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to the Lorent Bloom platform (hereinafter referred to as "Platform", "Service", "Lorent Bloom"). These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of the Lorent Bloom website and related services.
introduction.description: Lorent Bloom is an online platform that provides users with the technical capability to post rental listings and interact with each other. Lorent Bloom is not a party to transactions concluded between users.
introduction.intermediary: Lorent Bloom is provided to users free of charge and does not process payments. The Platform offers users certain trust and safety tools described in Section 3, including verification of user identity through the Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP), facilitation of a written rental agreement signed by both parties when an offer is accepted, and an in-Platform chat with mandatory photographic documentation at each step of a transaction. These tools assist users but do not make Lorent Bloom a party, legal guarantor, agent, insurer, or representative in any rental transaction, and do not constitute warranties or commitments regarding the conduct of users, the condition of items, or the outcome of any transaction. The Platform functions exclusively as a technical service connecting users.
introduction.agreement: By using the Platform, you confirm your agreement to these Terms.

acceptanceOfTerms.heading: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.content: By creating an account, posting listings, or using any features of the Platform, you confirm that you have:

list.item2: agree to comply with them in full;

acceptanceOfTerms.warning: If you do not agree to the terms, you must stop using the Platform.

ageAndCapacity.heading: 2.1. Age and Legal Capacity
ageAndCapacity.content: You may only use the Platform if you are at least 18 years of age and have full legal capacity to enter into binding contracts under the laws of the Republic of Moldova. If you register on behalf of a legal entity, you confirm that you have the authority to bind that entity to these Terms. Lorent Bloom bears no responsibility for any use of the Platform by persons lacking such age or capacity, and any contracts entered into in violation of this clause shall not give rise to any liability on the part of Lorent Bloom.

lorentbloomStatus.point1: 3.1. Lorent Bloom is not a lessor, lessee, agent, broker, carrier, or insurer.
lorentbloomStatus.point2: 3.2. All arrangements regarding rental, transfer, return, condition of items, payment, deposit, delivery, and any other terms occur exclusively between users.

list.item1: does not verify the quality, safety, legality, or condition of items;
list.item2: does not guarantee the integrity, character, intentions, or future conduct of users;
list.item3: is not responsible for the fulfillment or non-fulfillment of obligations by users.

trustTools.heading: 3.4. Trust and Safety Tools
trustTools.content: Without modifying the disclaimers set out in this Section, the Platform provides certain technical tools intended to facilitate trust between users, including but not limited to: (a) verification of user identity using the Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP); (b) facilitation of a written rental agreement electronically acknowledged by both parties when a rental offer is accepted; (c) an in-Platform chat allowing users to exchange messages and photographs documenting the condition of items at each step of a transaction. These tools are provided for the convenience of users as good-faith assistance, but do not constitute warranties, guarantees, insurance, or commitments by Lorent Bloom regarding the conduct, identity, performance, or honesty of any user, the condition or legality of any item, or the outcome of any rental transaction.

identityVerification.heading: 3.5. Identity Verification
identityVerification.content: Identity verification through IDNP and any related documents is performed on a good-faith basis using the information submitted by users. Lorent Bloom does not independently investigate the authenticity of submitted documents beyond standard automated and manual checks and assumes no liability if a verified user provides false, fraudulent, expired, or otherwise inaccurate information. The fact that a user has been verified does not constitute a warranty by Lorent Bloom of that user's character, solvency, intentions, or future conduct, and shall not be relied upon as such.

rentalAgreement.heading: 3.6. Rental Agreement Facilitation
rentalAgreement.content: When a rental offer is accepted on the Platform, the Platform may generate and store a written agreement bearing the electronic acknowledgement of both users. Any such agreement is a contract concluded directly between those users. Lorent Bloom is not a party, witness, signatory, notary, or guarantor of that agreement. Lorent Bloom merely provides the technical means to generate, exchange, and retain a record of the document, and assumes no responsibility for its legal validity, completeness, enforceability, interpretation, or compliance with the parties' actual intentions or with applicable law.

chatAndPhotos.heading: 3.7. Chat and Photographic Documentation
chatAndPhotos.content: The Platform provides a chat function through which users may exchange messages and photographs documenting the condition of an item at various stages of a rental transaction. All such content is provided voluntarily by users and is not verified, authenticated, time-stamped for evidentiary purposes, or independently inspected by Lorent Bloom. Lorent Bloom does not warrant the accuracy, integrity, completeness, evidentiary value, admissibility, or authenticity of any such content, and is not liable for any reliance placed on it by users or by third parties, including in legal or insurance proceedings.

listingReview.heading: 3.8. Administrative Review of Listings
listingReview.content: Before a user listing is published on the Platform, Lorent Bloom performs a basic administrative review intended to: (a) identify and reject listings that clearly violate these Terms or applicable law (such as illegal, dangerous, prohibited, or counterfeit items); and (b) confirm appropriate categorization. This review is administrative and screening in nature only. It does not constitute a substantive verification of the accuracy, legality, safety, quality, authenticity, ownership, or condition of items, nor an endorsement, approval, recommendation, warranty, or guarantee by Lorent Bloom. Approval of a listing creates no liability or warranty obligation on the part of Lorent Bloom and shall not be relied upon by users as a representation of any kind. Lorent Bloom may reject, remove, modify, or recategorize any listing at any time, at its sole discretion, before or after publication, and is not liable for any consequences of such actions.

generalDisclaimer.heading: 3.9. General Disclaimer of Responsibility for Events Between Users and Off the Platform
generalDisclaimer.content: Without limiting any other provision of these Terms, Lorent Bloom shall not be liable for, and bears no responsibility in respect of, any event, act, omission, transaction, arrangement, communication, transfer, loss, damage, injury, claim, or consequence of any kind occurring: (a) between users, whether on the Platform or off the Platform; (b) off the Platform, including but not limited to in-person meetings, physical handover or inspection of items, telephone calls, conversations conducted through third-party messaging services, payments arranged or executed outside the Platform, and any conduct of users in the physical world; and (c) involving third parties contacted by users in connection with the Platform but acting outside its scope. Lorent Bloom's role is strictly limited to providing the technical Platform as described in this Section 3, and any obligation, dispute, or consequence arising between users or beyond the Platform is a matter solely between those users.

userAccount.point2: 4.2. The user is fully responsible for:

Lorent Bloom is not liable for any consequences arising from such measures.
userAccount.point5: 4.5. You may close your account at any time by sending a written request to support@lorentbloom.com. Closure of an account does not terminate any rental agreements concluded with other users prior to closure, does not relieve you of any outstanding obligations under these Terms or under such rental agreements, and does not affect any rights or obligations that have accrued before closure. Your personal data will be processed in accordance with Section 13 after account closure.

list.item1: comply with applicable laws of the Republic of Moldova;

rentalRisks.riskConclusion: are borne exclusively by the users participating in the transaction.
rentalRisks.point2: 6.2. Lorent Bloom is not responsible for:
rentalRisks.point3: 6.3. Users independently resolve matters of insurance, deposit, and identity verification, regardless of any tools provided by the Platform for these purposes.

payments.heading: 7. Payments
payments.point1: 7.1. Lorent Bloom does not process payments and is not a payment service provider, payment institution, payment agent, escrow agent, or financial intermediary of any kind. Lorent Bloom does not collect, hold, transfer, or guarantee any funds between users. All payments related to rental transactions are arranged and executed directly between users, using methods of their own choosing, outside the Platform and entirely beyond the supervision, control, or responsibility of Lorent Bloom.
payments.point2: 7.2. All financial claims must be resolved directly between users themselves. Lorent Bloom is under no obligation to recover, refund, or compensate any sum exchanged or owed between users.
payments.point3: 7.3. At that time, Lorent Bloom will be subject to and reserves the right to perform identity verification (KYC) and anti-money-laundering checks in accordance with Law No. 308/2017 of the Republic of Moldova on Preventing and Combating Money Laundering and Terrorism Financing, and to refuse, suspend, restrict, or report transactions where required by applicable law.

list.item1: violating any applicable law;
list.item2: posting illegal, dangerous, counterfeit, or stolen items, including weapons, ammunition, controlled substances, hazardous materials, or items requiring special licenses you do not hold;

userContent.disclaimer: While Lorent Bloom performs a basic administrative review of listings before publication as described in Section 3.8, Lorent Bloom does not substantively verify user content and is not responsible for its accuracy, legality, relevance, or truthfulness. noticeAndTakedown.heading: 9.2. Notice and Takedown
noticeAndTakedown.content: If you believe that any content on the Platform violates your rights, applicable law, or these Terms (including, without limitation, intellectual property infringement, illegal listings, fraudulent content, or harmful material), you may submit a notice to support@lorentbloom.com. reportingViolations.content: Users may report fraud, abusive behavior, safety concerns, suspicious activity, or any other violation of these Terms by writing to support@lorentbloom.com. Lorent Bloom will investigate such reports in good faith but does not guarantee any specific outcome and is not liable for any action taken or not taken in response to a report.

natureOfListings.heading: 9.4. Nature of Listings
natureOfListings.content: Listings published on the Platform constitute invitations to treat (invitații la ofertare) and not binding contractual offers by users. A rental contract between users is formed only upon explicit mutual acceptance, including, where applicable, through the agreement-facilitation tools described in Section 3.6. Lorent Bloom is not a party to such contracts and assumes no obligations arising from them.

reviews.heading: 9.5. Reviews and Ratings
reviews.content: Where the Platform provides functionality for users to submit reviews, ratings, or comments about other users or rental experiences, such submissions are user content within the meaning of Section 9.1. Users posting reviews are solely responsible for the accuracy and lawfulness of their statements, including any liability for defamation, insult, or breach of privacy. limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Lorent Bloom is not liable for:

disclaimer.content: The Platform and all related services and tools (including identity verification, agreement facilitation, chat, and photographic documentation) are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. mandatoryLaw.content: Nothing in these Terms shall exclude or limit Lorent Bloom's liability where such exclusion or limitation is prohibited by the mandatory laws of the Republic of Moldova, including liability for gross negligence, willful misconduct, death or personal injury caused by negligence, or for rights granted to consumers under Law No. 105/2003 on Consumer Protection. termination.content: Lorent Bloom reserves the right at any time to:

indemnity.content: To the extent permitted by applicable law and in proportion to the actual damages caused, the user agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold Lorent Bloom, its affiliates, officers, employees, and partners harmless from any claims, demands, losses, damages, fines, penalties, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees actually incurred) arising from:

suspension.content: Without prejudice to its right to terminate access under this Section, Lorent Bloom may temporarily suspend account access, listings, or specific Platform features pending investigation of suspected violations of these Terms, fraud, abuse, failed identity verification, or safety concerns, for a reasonable period and with notice where practicable. survival.content: The provisions of these Terms relating to intellectual property, user content licensing, limitation of liability, disclaimer of warranties, indemnification, dispute resolution, governing law, and any other provisions which by their nature are intended to survive shall remain in full force and effect after termination or expiration of these Terms, regardless of the reason for such termination.

disputeResolution.point1: 12.1. All disputes between users shall be resolved directly between them. disputeResolution.point2: 12.2. Disputes between a user and Lorent Bloom are subject to pre-trial settlement by written notice to support@lorentbloom.com. Lorent Bloom will acknowledge receipt within 5 business days and respond on the substance within 30 business days of the original notice.
disputeResolution.point3: 12.3. If the dispute cannot be resolved out of court, it shall be brought exclusively before the competent courts of Chișinău, Republic of Moldova, applying the laws of the Republic of Moldova. Nothing in this Section limits any non-waivable right of a user qualifying as a consumer to bring proceedings in the courts of their country of habitual residence, where such rights apply under applicable conflict-of-laws rules.

classAction.heading: 12.4. Individual Disputes
classAction.content: To the extent permitted by applicable law, disputes shall be resolved on an individual basis. You waive any right to participate in a class action, collective action, or representative proceeding against Lorent Bloom, except where such waiver is prohibited by mandatory consumer protection law.

forceMajeure.heading: 12.5. Force Majeure
forceMajeure.content: Lorent Bloom is not liable for full or partial non-fulfillment of obligations under these Terms if such non-fulfillment is caused by force majeure circumstances beyond its reasonable control, including but not limited to: natural disasters, fires, floods, military actions, civil unrest, government decisions, epidemics or pandemics, failures in public communication networks, failures in power supply, or failures of third-party services.

privacyPolicy.heading: 13. Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: Processing of users' personal data is carried out in accordance with Law No. 133 of 07.08.2011 of the Republic of Moldova "On Personal Data Protection". The following provisions provide a summary of how personal data is processed; the full and authoritative description is set out in our separate Privacy Policy. In the event of any inconsistency between this Section and the Privacy Policy, the Privacy Policy shall prevail.

purposes.content: Lorent Bloom processes personal data exclusively for the purposes of:

list.item1: providing access to the Platform and its functionality, including identity verification, agreement facilitation, and chat features;
list.item2: user identification, fraud prevention, and account security;
list.item3: ensuring technical operation, maintenance, and improvement of the service;
list.item4: compliance with legal, tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements.

legalBases.heading: 13.1. Legal Bases for Processing
legalBases.content: Lorent Bloom processes personal data on the following legal bases under Law No. 133/2011: (a) performance of the contract with you constituted by these Terms; (b) compliance with legal obligations applicable to Lorent Bloom; (c) the legitimate interests of Lorent Bloom in operating, securing, and improving the Platform, including the prevention of fraud and abuse; and (d) your explicit consent, where required, which you may withdraw at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out prior to withdrawal. The processing of the Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP) and identity document data is performed exclusively for user identification, fraud prevention, and protection of the rights of other users and Lorent Bloom, on the legal bases of contract performance and the legitimate interests of Lorent Bloom, in compliance with the special rules applicable to such data under Law No. 133/2011.

dataSubjectRights.heading: 13.2. Your Rights
dataSubjectRights.content: Under Law No. 133/2011 you have the right to: (a) access your personal data; (b) request rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data; (c) request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten") where the legal grounds for processing no longer apply; (d) request restriction of processing; (e) object to processing based on legitimate interests; (f) receive your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format; (g) withdraw any consent you have given; and (h) lodge a complaint with the National Center for Personal Data Protection of the Republic of Moldova. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@lorentbloom.com. Lorent Bloom will respond within the time periods provided by law.

retention.heading: 13.3. Data Retention
retention.content: Lorent Bloom retains personal data for as long as your account is active and for an additional period of up to 3 (three) years thereafter for legal, tax, accounting, fraud-prevention, and dispute-resolution purposes, unless a longer retention period is required by law. Identity verification data and chat records relating to concluded rental transactions may be retained for the same period as evidentiary material. Where retention is no longer justified, data is deleted or anonymized.

privacyPolicy.thirdParty: Lorent Bloom does not transfer personal data to third parties, except in cases directly provided by law, ordered by competent authorities, or necessary for service provision (identity verification providers, hosting providers, communication providers, and other technical partners) and always under written agreements ensuring an adequate level of data protection.

dataTypes.content: Personal data may include, among others:

list.item1: first and last name;
list.item2: phone number;
list.item3: email address;
list.item5: Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP) and identity document data;
list.item6: rental transaction history, chat content, and photographs uploaded through the Platform.

privacyPolicy.consent: The user confirms that they provide their personal data voluntarily and consent to its processing for the stated purposes, where consent is the relevant legal basis.
privacyPolicy.moreInfo: Detailed terms of processing, storage, and protection of personal data are set out in a separate document — the Privacy Policy posted on the Platform.

changes.heading: 14. Changes to Terms
changes.content: Lorent Bloom may modify these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be notified to users at least 14 (fourteen) calendar days before they take effect by: (a) posting the updated Terms on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date; and (b) sending a notice to your registered email address or displaying a notice within the Platform. Purely editorial or technical changes that do not affect users' rights or obligations (such as correction of typographical errors, clarification of existing language, or updates to non-substantive references) may take effect immediately upon posting. Where there is any reasonable doubt as to whether a change is material, Lorent Bloom will treat it as material and provide the 14 (fourteen) day notice period. If you do not agree with the changes, you must close your account before they take effect; continued use of the Platform after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. Changes do not apply retroactively to disputes arising before their effective date.

consumerRights.heading: 15. Consumer Rights
consumerRights.content: If you qualify as a consumer under Law No. 105/2003 of the Republic of Moldova on Consumer Protection, you retain all mandatory rights granted to you by law. Nothing in these Terms is intended to limit, exclude, or modify rights that cannot be waived under applicable consumer protection legislation. Where any provision of these Terms is found to conflict with a mandatory consumer right, the relevant provision shall apply only to the extent permitted by law, and the remainder of the Terms shall remain in force.

withdrawal.heading: 15.1. Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.content: The Platform is provided to users free of charge. Because Lorent Bloom does not currently offer any paid distance service, the consumer right of withdrawal under Law No. 105/2003 does not apply to the user's relationship with Lorent Bloom. Should Lorent Bloom in the future offer any paid distance service, these Terms will be amended in accordance with Section 14 and the applicable withdrawal procedure will be set out at that time. For rental transactions concluded between users, any withdrawal, cancellation, or refund rights, where applicable under consumer law, must be addressed with the other user as the contractual counterparty, and not with Lorent Bloom.

severability.heading: 16.1. Severability
severability.content: If any provision of these Terms is held by a competent court or authority to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, that provision shall be deemed modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable, or, if it cannot be so modified, severed from these Terms. The remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

entireAgreement.heading: 16.2. Entire Agreement
entireAgreement.content: These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Lorent Bloom regarding the use of the Platform and supersede any prior agreements, representations, or understandings, whether oral or written.

noWaiver.heading: 16.3. No Waiver
noWaiver.content: The failure or delay of Lorent Bloom to exercise or enforce any right or provision of these Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. No waiver of any provision shall be effective unless made in writing by an authorized representative of Lorent Bloom.

assignment.heading: 16.4. Assignment
assignment.content: You may not assign, transfer, or delegate any of your rights or obligations under these Terms without the prior written consent of Lorent Bloom. governingLanguage.heading: 16.5. Governing Language
governingLanguage.content: These Terms may be made available in multiple languages for convenience. In the event of any inconsistency or conflict between language versions, the Romanian version shall prevail as the official text.

electronicCommunications.heading: 16.6. Electronic Communications
electronicCommunications.content: By using the Platform, you consent to receive communications, notices, and disclosures from Lorent Bloom in electronic form, including via email, in-Platform messages, or postings on the Platform. You agree that such electronic communications satisfy any legal requirement that such communications be in writing.

governingLaw.heading: 16.7. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Moldova, including without limitation Law No. 284/2004 on Electronic Commerce, Law No. 133/2011 on Personal Data Protection, Law No. 105/2003 on Consumer Protection, and the Civil Code of the Republic of Moldova.

noAgency.content: Nothing in these Terms creates any employment, agency, partnership, joint-venture, or franchise relationship between you and Lorent Bloom. You have no authority to bind Lorent Bloom or to act on its behalf in any matter, and you shall not represent yourself, expressly or by implication, as having such authority.

noThirdPartyBeneficiaries.content: These Terms are for the exclusive benefit of the user and Lorent Bloom. No third party shall have any right to enforce any provision of these Terms, except where mandatory law expressly grants such rights to identified third parties.

A legal entity for the Platform's operation is in the process of being established in the Republic of Moldova; upon completion of registration, the updated entity details (registered name, IDNO, and registered office address) will be published in this Section. metadata.title: Privacy Policy for the Rental Marketplace
metadata.description: Learn how Lorent Bloom collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal data, and what rights you have under Moldovan data protection law.

introduction.heading: 1. Introduction and Operator
introduction.content: This Privacy Policy (hereinafter referred to as the "Policy") explains how the Lorent Bloom platform (hereinafter referred to as "Platform", "Service", "Lorent Bloom", "we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, stores, discloses, and protects your personal data when you access or use the Platform.
introduction.controller: For the purposes of this Policy and Law No. 133 of 07.08.2011 of the Republic of Moldova on Personal Data Protection, Lorent Bloom acts as the data controller of personal data processed through the Platform. Information about the legal entity operating the Platform is set out in Section 17 of this Policy.
introduction.scope: This Policy applies to all personal data processed in connection with your use of the Platform. By using the Platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and accepted the terms of this Policy together with our Terms of Policy.
introduction.agreement: If you do not agree with this Policy, please do not use the Platform.

regulatoryFramework.heading: 2. Regulatory Framework
regulatoryFramework.content: We process personal data in compliance with the applicable laws of the Republic of Moldova and recognized international standards, including, in particular:

list.item1: the Constitution of the Republic of Moldova (in particular Article 28 on the right to personal privacy);
list.item2: Law No. 133 of 07.08.2011 on Personal Data Protection;
list.item3: Government Resolution No. 1123 of 14.12.2010 on the security requirements for the processing of personal data;
list.item4: Government Resolution No. 296 of 15.05.2012 approving the Register of Personal Data Operators;
list.item7: Law No. 308/2017 on Preventing and Combating Money Laundering and Terrorism Financing (in the event Lorent Bloom introduces payment functionality in the future);
list.item8: the Civil Code of the Republic of Moldova;
list.item9: internationally recognized data protection principles, including those reflected in Council of Europe Convention 108+ and, by reference, Directive 95/46/EC and the GDPR.

regulatoryFramework.commitment: We are committed to ensuring lawful, fair, transparent, and proportionate processing of your personal data at all times.

dataCollected.heading: 3. Data We Collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect personal data in three categories: data you provide directly, data collected automatically, and data received from third parties. We treat the Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP) and identity document data as sensitive personal data requiring special protection.

directData.heading: 3.1. Data You Provide Directly
directData.content: When you register, create listings, communicate with other users, or interact with the Platform, we collect data you actively provide, including:

list.item1: email address (required for registration);
list.item2: first and last name;
list.item3: phone number;
list.item4: authentication credentials (password, in hashed form only);
list.item5: Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP) and identity document data, when identity verification is required (see Section 3.4);
list.item6: listing content, including item descriptions, categories, and photographs;
list.item7: messages and photographs exchanged through the in-Platform chat at each stage of a rental transaction;
list.item8: rental agreements electronically acknowledged by both parties through the Platform;
list.item9: any other information you voluntarily submit through forms, support requests, or feedback.

automaticData.heading: 3.2. Data Collected Automatically
automaticData.content: When you use the Platform, certain technical and behavioral information is collected automatically, including:

list.item1: IP address and approximate geographic location derived from it;
list.item2: device information (type, model, operating system, browser, screen resolution, language settings);
list.item3: Platform activity (pages visited, search queries, clicks, time spent, referring URLs);
list.item4: authentication and session data (login times, session identifiers, password change events);
list.item5: cookies and similar technologies (see the separate Cookie Policy).

thirdPartyData.heading: 3.3. Data from Third Parties and Public Sources
thirdPartyData.content: We may receive limited data about you from third parties, including: technical and statistical information from analytics providers; data from authentication providers if you use a third-party login service; information from fraud-prevention or compliance providers; and data lawfully available in public registries. We use such data only for the purposes set out in this Policy and only where there is a lawful basis to do so.

sensitiveData.heading: 3.4. Sensitive Data — IDNP and Identity Documents
sensitiveData.content: The Moldovan personal identification number (IDNP) and data from identity documents are treated as sensitive personal data under Law No. 133/2011. We process such data only where it is strictly necessary, on the dual legal basis of (a) your explicit consent, given at the moment of identity verification, and (b) performance of the contract between you and Lorent Bloom. You may withdraw your consent at any time, in which case we will cease using your IDNP for further processing and delete it unless retention is required by law (for example, for fraud investigation, dispute resolution, or accounting purposes).

purposes.heading: 4. Purposes of Processing
purposes.content: We process personal data exclusively for the following purposes:

list.item1: creation, authentication, and security of user accounts;
list.item2: publication, administrative review, and management of listings;
list.item3: verification of user identity through IDNP and supporting documents;
list.item4: facilitation of rental agreements between users (including electronic signature flow) and preservation of chat and photographic records as described in our Terms of Policy;
list.item5: trust and safety, including detection and prevention of fraud, abuse, harassment, and content that violates these Terms or applicable law;
list.item6: communication with you, including transactional notifications, service announcements, and responses to support requests;
list.item7: compliance with legal obligations (including tax, accounting, regulatory, and judicial requirements);
list.item8: operation, maintenance, security, debugging, and improvement of the Platform and its features;
list.item9: exercise and defense of legal claims, both by users and by Lorent Bloom.

purposes.noProfiling: We do not currently make decisions about you based solely on automated processing that produce significant legal or similar effects on you. If we ever introduce such automated decision-making, this Policy will be updated and you will be informed in advance.

legalBases.heading: 5. Legal Bases for Processing
legalBases.content: We process personal data on the following legal bases under Law No. 133/2011 art. 5:

list.item1: (a) performance of the contract between you and Lorent Bloom (these Terms and the Privacy Policy), or steps taken at your request prior to entering into a contract (such as account registration);
list.item2: (b) compliance with legal obligations to which Lorent Bloom is subject (for example, tax, anti-fraud, and judicial requirements);
list.item3: (c) legitimate interests pursued by Lorent Bloom in operating, securing, and improving the Platform, including fraud prevention, system integrity, and user trust — provided such interests are not overridden by your rights and freedoms;
list.item4: (d) your explicit consent, where required (in particular for IDNP processing and any non-essential marketing communications). You may withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing performed prior to withdrawal.

legalBases.idnpBasis: Specifically, processing of the IDNP and identity document data is performed on a dual legal basis: explicit consent (Law No. 133/2011 art. 6) and contract performance. This is the strongest legal posture available under Moldovan data protection law for sensitive identifiers.

retention.heading: 6. Data Retention
retention.intro: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected, in accordance with applicable law. Specific retention periods are as follows:

list.item1: data necessary for the operation of an active account is retained for as long as the account remains active;
list.item2: after account closure, personal data is retained for up to 3 (three) years for legal, tax, accounting, fraud-prevention, and dispute-resolution purposes, unless a longer retention period is required by law;
list.item3: IDNP and identity document data is deleted upon account closure or earlier upon withdrawal of consent, unless retention is required by applicable law or by an ongoing investigation or dispute;
list.item4: chat content, photographs uploaded through chat, and electronically signed rental agreements may be retained for the same period as other transactional records and may be relied upon as evidentiary material in disputes between users;
list.item5: technical logs (access logs, security logs, error logs) are retained for up to 12 (twelve) months unless a longer period is required for security or legal reasons;
list.item6: if an account remains inactive for more than 12 (twelve) consecutive months, we may notify you and, in the absence of any response or pending obligation, delete the account and associated personal data;
list.item7: where retention is no longer justified, data is securely deleted or irreversibly anonymized.

recipients.heading: 7. Who We Share Your Data With
recipients.intro: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only as necessary to operate the Platform, comply with law, or protect the rights of users and Lorent Bloom, and only with the following categories of recipients:

list.item1: hosting and cloud infrastructure providers, who store and process data on our behalf under contractual obligations of confidentiality and security;
list.item2: communication providers (for example, email and SMS providers) used to deliver transactional notifications;
list.item3: identity-verification providers, where applicable, for the limited purpose of confirming IDNP and identity documents;
list.item4: analytics providers, who receive aggregated or pseudonymized data to help us understand Platform usage;
list.item5: professional advisors (legal, accounting, audit), bound by confidentiality;
list.item6: government, regulatory, judicial, or law-enforcement authorities, where required by a binding legal request or applicable law;
list.item7: successor entities, in the event of a merger, acquisition, reorganization, or sale of assets, in which case this Policy will continue to apply to your data unless and until a new policy is communicated to you in accordance with Section 15.

recipients.safeguards: All recipients acting on our behalf are bound by written agreements requiring them to maintain a level of data protection at least equivalent to that required by Moldovan law and to use personal data exclusively for the purposes we specify. We do not currently list specific vendor names in this Policy; the categories above describe the types of recipients that may process data on our behalf as our vendor stack evolves.
recipients.publicData: Information that you choose to make public on the Platform (such as parts of your listings or profile visible to other users) is accessible to third parties by design. You should exercise discretion regarding any information you choose to make publicly visible.

internationalTransfers.heading: 8. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Personal data may be processed by Lorent Bloom or by our service providers in locations outside the Republic of Moldova, for example where hosting, communication, or analytics services are provided from servers located abroad.
internationalTransfers.safeguards: Where personal data is transferred outside the Republic of Moldova, we ensure that an adequate level of protection is in place by relying on one or more of the following safeguards: (a) transfers to jurisdictions recognized as providing an adequate level of protection under Moldovan or European Commission decisions; (b) transfers to parties to the Council of Europe Convention 108 and its modernized version 108+; (c) standard contractual clauses or equivalent contractual safeguards binding the recipient to data-protection obligations comparable to those imposed by Law No. 133/2011; (d) other safeguards approved by the National Centre for Personal Data Protection of the Republic of Moldova.

yourRights.heading: 9. Your Rights
yourRights.intro: Under Law No. 133/2011 you have the following rights with respect to your personal data:

list.item1: the right of access — to obtain confirmation as to whether we process your data and to receive a copy of such data;
list.item2: the right of rectification — to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data;
list.item3: the right of erasure ("right to be forgotten") — to request deletion of your data where the legal basis for processing no longer exists, subject to legal retention obligations;
list.item4: the right to restriction of processing — to request that we limit processing in specific circumstances (for example, while we verify the accuracy of disputed data);
list.item5: the right to object — to processing based on our legitimate interests, including for direct marketing;
list.item6: the right to data portability — to receive your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format and, where technically feasible, to have it transmitted to another controller;
list.item7: the right to withdraw consent — at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing performed prior to withdrawal (in particular for IDNP processing);
list.item8: the right to lodge a complaint with the National Centre for Personal Data Protection of the Republic of Moldova (contact details in Section 16).

exerciseRights.heading: 10. How to Exercise Your Rights
exerciseRights.content: To exercise any of the rights listed in Section 9, please contact us at support@lorentbloom.com. So that we can respond securely, we may ask you to confirm your identity before acting on a request.
exerciseRights.timing: We aim to respond to all requests within 1 (one) calendar month from the date of receipt. If a request is particularly complex or if several requests are received together, we may extend this period by up to 2 (two) additional months, in which case we will inform you of the extension and the reasons.
exerciseRights.fees: Exercising your rights is free of charge. However, where a request is manifestly unfounded, repetitive, or excessive, we may either charge a reasonable fee or refuse to act on the request, in accordance with Law No. 133/2011.
exerciseRights.complaint: If you believe that our processing of your personal data infringes applicable law, you may at any time lodge a complaint with the National Centre for Personal Data Protection of the Republic of Moldova (see Section 16). We encourage you to contact us first so that we may seek to resolve your concerns directly.

security.heading: 11. Security Measures
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized or unlawful processing and against accidental loss, destruction, or damage, taking into account the nature of the data, the risks involved, and the state of the art.
security.technical: Technical measures include: encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS); encryption of sensitive data at rest where appropriate; access controls and role-based permissions; audit logging of access to personal data; regular security assessments and penetration testing of the Platform; secure password storage using cryptographic hashing; and segregation of production data from development environments.
security.organizational: Organizational measures include: a need-to-know principle for staff access to personal data; confidentiality obligations binding our personnel and contractors; training on data protection and information security; incident response and breach notification procedures; and regular review of our security posture.
security.disclaimer: Despite these measures, no system or means of transmission over the Internet can be guaranteed to be entirely secure. You are responsible for keeping your authentication credentials confidential and for promptly notifying us at support@lorentbloom.com of any suspected unauthorized access to your account.
security.breachNotification: In the event of a personal data breach likely to result in a high risk to your rights and freedoms, Lorent Bloom will notify you and the National Centre for Personal Data Protection of the Republic of Moldova without undue delay, in accordance with Law No. 133/2011. Notifications to you will describe the nature of the breach, the likely consequences, the measures taken or proposed to address it, and steps you may take to protect yourself.

marketing.heading: 12. Marketing Communications
marketing.transactional: We may send you transactional communications that are necessary for the operation of the Platform — for example, account confirmations, security notifications, listing status updates, and responses to your support requests. Because these messages are necessary to deliver the Service, you cannot opt out of them while you maintain an account.
marketing.promotional: We will send promotional or marketing communications only with your prior consent, where consent is required by law, or where permitted on the basis of our legitimate interest in informing existing users of related services. You may opt out of all promotional communications at any time, free of charge, by using the unsubscribe mechanism included in such communications or by contacting support@lorentbloom.com.
marketing.status: At present, Lorent Bloom does not conduct any active marketing campaigns. Should this change, this Policy will be updated in accordance with Section 15.

cookies.heading: 13. Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies for authentication, session management, security, preferences, and analytics. Details of the categories of cookies used, your choices, and how to manage cookie preferences are set out in our separate Cookie Policy, which forms part of this Privacy Policy.

children.heading: 14. Children's Privacy
children.content: The Platform is intended exclusively for persons aged 18 years or older who have full legal capacity to enter into binding contracts under the laws of the Republic of Moldova, as set out in Section 2.1 of our Terms of Policy. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a person under 18 without verifiable parental authority, we will delete that data and close the account as soon as practicable. If you believe a minor has provided personal data to the Platform, please contact support@lorentbloom.com.

changes.heading: 15. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: Lorent Bloom may modify this Policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified to users at least 14 (fourteen) calendar days before they take effect, by posting the updated Policy on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date and by sending a notice to your registered email address or displaying a notice within the Platform. Purely editorial or technical changes that do not affect users' rights may take effect immediately upon posting. Changes do not apply retroactively to processing performed before their effective date. Your continued use of the Platform after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

dpa.heading: 16. Data Protection Authority
dpa.content: The supervisory authority for personal data protection in the Republic of Moldova is the National Centre for Personal Data Protection (Centrul Național pentru Protecția Datelor cu Caracter Personal). You have the right to lodge a complaint with this authority at any time.
dpa.address: Address: 48 Sergei Lazo Street, Chișinău MD-2004, Republic of Moldova. Website: datepersonale.md.

contact.heading: 17. Contact Us
contact.entity: Lorent Bloom is currently operated as a pre-launch platform. A legal entity for the Platform's operation is in the process of being established in the Republic of Moldova; upon completion of registration, the updated entity details (registered name, IDNO, and registered office address) will be published in this Section and in Section 17 of our Terms of Policy.
contact.content: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, to exercise any of your rights, or to make a complaint about the way we handle your personal data, please contact us at support@lorentbloom.com.
contact.governingLanguage: This Privacy Policy may be made available in multiple languages for the convenience of users. In the event of any inconsistency or conflict between language versions, the Romanian version shall prevail as the official text, in line with Section 16.5 of our Terms of Policy.

cookie-policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie-policy.intro: This Cookie Policy (hereinafter referred to as the "Policy") explains how the Lorent Bloom platform (hereinafter referred to as "Lorent Bloom", "we", "our service") uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit and use our website. This Policy should be read together with our Privacy Policy and Terms of Policy, which it complements.

metadata.title: Cookie Policy for the Rental Marketplace
metadata.description: Learn how the Lorent Bloom platform uses cookies, what categories are deployed, and how you can manage your cookie preferences at any time.

whatAreCookies.heading: 1. What are cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit websites. They allow the website to recognize your device, ensure proper service operation, and improve user experience.

operator.heading: 2. Operator and Applicable Law
operator.content: This Cookie Policy is published by Lorent Bloom, which acts as the operator and data controller responsible for the cookies and similar technologies deployed on the Platform. Information about the legal entity operating the Platform is set out in Section 17 of our Terms of Policy. This Cookie Policy is governed by the laws of the Republic of Moldova, including Law No. 133/2011 on Personal Data Protection and Law No. 284/2004 on Electronic Commerce, and forms part of the integrated agreement described in Section 16.2 of our Terms of Policy.

cookieTypes.heading: 3. Types of cookies we use
cookieTypes.intro: Lorent Bloom uses the following categories of cookies:

required.heading: 3.1. Required (technical) cookies
required.content: These cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of the Platform and cannot be disabled in system settings. They are used, in particular, for:

list.item1: user authentication;
list.item2: session preservation;
list.item3: security assurance (including CSRF protection and abuse prevention);
list.item4: proper functioning of core site features.

required.note: Without these cookies, the Platform cannot function properly. Required cookies are deployed without separate consent, as their deployment is strictly necessary to provide the Service requested by the user.

functional.heading: 3.2. Functional cookies
functional.content: Functional cookies allow the Platform to remember your choices (such as language, region, interface settings, cookie-banner state) and provide a more personalized experience. Functional cookies are deployed only with your prior consent.

analytics.heading: 3.3. Analytics cookies
analytics.content: Analytics cookies are used to collect aggregated and pseudonymized information about how users interact with the Platform. This helps us:

list.item1: analyze traffic and usage patterns;
list.item2: improve service functionality;
list.item3: identify technical errors.

analytics.note: Analytics cookies are deployed only with your prior consent. The data collected through analytics cookies is processed in pseudonymized form and does not allow direct user identification.

cookieInventory.heading: 3.4. Cookies Currently Deployed by the Platform
cookieInventory.content: A complete and current list of cookies deployed by the Platform — including cookie names, providers, purposes, and retention durations — is made available through the cookie preferences panel accessible within the Platform (see Section 5). Lorent Bloom commits to keeping this list current and accurate; should the technical stack change, the list is updated accordingly. The following list is a non-exhaustive overview of typical cookies deployed by the Platform:

list.item1: session and authentication cookies (Required, deleted at session end or shortly thereafter);
list.item2: security cookies, including CSRF protection tokens (Required, short-lived);
list.item3: locale and interface-preference cookies (Functional, persistent up to 12 months);
list.item4: cookie-banner consent-state cookies (Required, persistent up to 12 months);
list.item5: analytics identifiers, where you have given explicit consent (Analytics, persistent up to 12 months).

thirdPartyCookies.heading: 4. Third-party cookies
thirdPartyCookies.content: Lorent Bloom may use third-party services (such as hosting or analytics providers) that may place cookies on your device as part of their operation. Where such cookies result in the processing of your personal data, such processing is further described in our Privacy Policy, including the legal bases, retention periods, and your data-subject rights.
thirdPartyCookies.disclaimer: We do not control third-party cookies and recommend reviewing the privacy and cookie policies of any third-party services. Where third-party cookies fall into a non-essential category (such as analytics), they will be deployed only with your prior consent through the cookie banner.

managingCookies.heading: 5. Managing cookies
managingCookies.content: You can manage cookies in two ways. First, you may change your cookie preferences at any time directly within the Platform, using the cookie preferences panel accessible from the cookie banner displayed on first visit or from the Platform footer. Granular controls per category (Functional / Analytics) are provided, and changes apply immediately. Second, you may change your cookie settings in your browser, including:

list.item1: blocking all cookies;
list.item2: deleting saved cookies;
list.item3: receiving notifications when cookies are saved.

managingCookies.note: Please note that disabling or restricting cookies may result in some Platform features not working properly. Required cookies cannot be disabled, as they are necessary for the core functioning of the Service.

consent.heading: 6. Consent to use of cookies
consent.content: Required cookies (Section 3.1) are deployed without separate consent, as they are strictly necessary to provide the Service. For all other categories of cookies (Functional, Analytics, and any future categories), Lorent Bloom requests your explicit, affirmative consent through the cookie banner displayed on your first visit to the Platform.
consent.explicit: Continued use of the Platform without action on the cookie banner shall not be interpreted as consent. Consent is given only by clicking the "Accept" or equivalent option in the cookie banner, or by enabling specific cookie categories in the cookie preferences panel. You may grant consent on a per-category basis.
consent.withdrawal: You may withdraw your consent at any time, free of charge, through the cookie preferences panel or by clearing cookies in your browser. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal.

changes.heading: 7. Changes to Cookie Policy
changes.content: Lorent Bloom may modify this Cookie Policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified to users at least 14 (fourteen) calendar days before they take effect, by posting the updated Cookie Policy on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date and, where appropriate, displaying a notice within the Platform or on the cookie banner. Purely editorial or technical changes that do not affect users' rights may take effect immediately upon posting. Changes do not apply retroactively to cookies set before the effective date.

governingLanguage.heading: 8. Governing Language
governingLanguage.content: This Cookie Policy may be made available in multiple languages for the convenience of users. In the event of any inconsistency or conflict between language versions, the Romanian version shall prevail as the official text, in line with Section 16.5 of our Terms of Policy.

contact.heading: 9. Contact information
contact.content: If you have any questions about the use of cookies, or if you wish to exercise any of your rights in relation to personal data processed through cookies, please contact us at: support@lorentbloom.com
